MOTION Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Referral Of Action To Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS TIMOTHY MACAULEY AND AMALIA MACAULEY'S PETITION TO COMPEL REFERRAL OF ACTION TO BINDING ARBITRATION.
APPEARANCES: ROBERT M. DESKY, ESQUIRE (ANDERLINEI, FINKELSTEIN, EMERICK & SMOOT, 650.348.0102) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MARK ARRUTI, ESQUIRE (ARRUTI & ASSOCIATES) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANTS TIMOTHY MACAULEY AND AMALIA MACAULEY'S PETITION TO COMPEL REFERRAL OF ACTION TO BINDING ARBITRATION. COURT STAYS ACTION PENDING OUTCOME OF ARBITRATION PURSUANT TO SECTION 1281.2(C) OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJB/KD) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
